description: Style Note   Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. Wear this piece   with leggings and delicate sandals.      Product Details   White, green and blue kurta with a round neck, is sleeveless, has blue panelling around the neckline and armhole and a curved hem     Material and Care   100% Cotton   Wash dark colours separately   Do not bleach   Dry inside out in shade   Warm iron do not iron on decorations     Size and Fit   Regular Fit   The model (height 5'8â &euro
